title: oxalis smallii
intro: Oxalis smallii, also known as yellow wood sorrel or small yellow wood sorrel, is a perennial plant belonging to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Oxalis smallii include treating kidney stones, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis, as well as its potential to help manage high blood pressure. Oxalis smallii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
